$doc: Codex hook registration. Symlinked to ~/.codex/hooks.json (Codex does not rewrite it today; leos-doctor asserts it is still a symlink). Same exit-code contract as Claude: guard 43->2 (fail-closed on missing script), formatter 44->2 (fail-open), council 42->2 (fail-open). $CODEX_HOME + $HOME expand at execution so a relocated CODEX_HOME keeps working.

hooks.command: sh -c 'CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"; S="$CODEX_HOME"/hooks/bash-guard.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 2; python3 "$S"; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 43 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
sh -c 'CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"; S="$CODEX_HOME"/hooks/format-on-edit.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; python3 "$S"; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 44 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
sh -c 'CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"; S="$CODEX_HOME"/council/bin/council.py; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; python3 "$S" hook; ec=$?; [ "$ec" = 42 ] && exit 2; exit 0'
